title: Masters teach Vuvuzela a hard lesson
description: GEORGE NEWS - The Zone 9 outfit Young...
bodyText:
GEORGE NEWS - The Zone 9 outfit Young Masters did their name justice when they gave the struggling Vuvuzela a humiliating 6-0 hiding at the Lawaaikamp Stadium last Saturday, ensuring that Vuvuzela stays at the bottom of the promotional log.


> Masters are working their way up the log with hopes of reaching the promotion position.


Scoring two goals in quick succession just before half time, Young Masters were well on their way to victory.

Vuvuzela started the second half with force but could not break through Masters' defence.

Masters were enjoying the game, playing across the full scope of the field using great moves and displaying their skills.

They netted four goals in the second half while Vuvuzela fought in vain to manage even one.

The talented 15-year-old Wongama Koeberg of Young Masters played an excellent game and showed why he was among the promising players identified in the FNB Football First Development Festival recently.

‘We bring you the latest Garden Route, Hessequa, Karoo news’
